summary: UI theme update testing complete. All styling changes verified: navy sidebar (#0c3c60), green accent (#1e7a4d), Poppins font, #f4f6f9 background, green table headers with white text, 8px border-radius cards with proper shadow. Admin login, dashboard, all navigation, and MR login (regression) all working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI theme update verified. Key styling: sidebar=#0c3c60 (navy), accent/primary=#1e7a4d (green via HSL 155 61% 30%), bg=#f4f6f9, font=Poppins. Table headers use green bg with white text. Cards have 8px radius and 0 4px 12px shadow. All pages tested: Login, Dashboard, Doctors, Orders, Medicals, Agencies, Items, MR Reports. MR login at /mrvet/login works without regression.
